/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -D_GNU_SOURCE -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/app/src/WebSocketTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/app/src/WebSocketServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/app/src/ApplicationServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/WebSocketProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/ProtocolBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/ProtocolRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/ProtocolFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/Protocol/src/PureRedisProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/server/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/AsyncConsoleLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/AsyncLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/DoubleLockThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/base/SpdlogLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/util/ConfigReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/util/EnhancedConfigReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/IO/SelectMultiplexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/IO/EpollMultiplexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/WebSocketTest.dir/NetFramework/src/IO/PollMultiplexer.cpp.o -o bin/WebSocketTest  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -lrt -Wl,--as-needed
